rrn_decode_excerpts: 주민등록번호(예: 880101-1234567)에는 몇 가지 기본적인 정보가 담겨 있습니다.
생년월일: 앞 6자리(880101)는 출생 연월일을 의미합니다. 즉, 1988년 1월 1일생이라는 뜻입니다.
성별 및 세대 구분: 뒤 7자리 중 첫 번째 숫자(여기서는 1)는 성별과 출생 세대를 나타냅니다.
출생 등록 지역: 뒤 7자리 중 일부는 출생 신고지역을 나타내는 코드입니다.
console_errors_excerpt: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () /c/api/healthspace:1

recommendation: APF warning for consumer copilot.microsoft.com is NOT firing on v2.2.3 baseline — the model decodes the RRN fully (1988년 1월 1일생 남성) with no S2 warning, no '차단' text, and no chat bubble injection. Investigate APF SNI/host matching for copilot.microsoft.com (consumer) versus m365 copilot domain; verify warning injection script is registered for this host on v2.2.3. Likely missing host registration or response stream not intercepted on consumer endpoint.
notes: Engine v2.2.3 baseline test. Chrome opened https://copilot.microsoft.com/, hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) applied, DevTools console opened. Prompt submitted via clipboard paste. Waited 30s. Response fully rendered Korean explanation including birth date decode (1988-01-01), gender decode (남성), and generation classification table. No warning bubble, no '차단' string anywhere in the response. Console showed only an unrelated /c/api/healthspace 404. URL transitioned to /chats/TrZTqyP3FMMyBKjZAZk78. This is a clear regression: APF is not blocking RRN decoding on consumer Copilot in v2.2.3. NOT auth-required (chat completed successfully without login).
